title: codonoboea corrugata
intro: Codonoboea corrugata is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, commonly known as the wrinkled cordia vine. This plant has been traditionally used in various parts of the world for its medicinal properties, particularly in Southeast Asia, where it is valued for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Codonoboea corrugata include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be used to make tea, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
